body.notes: Add co-location awareness to inference routing. When local Ollama and the DB share the same machine, local inference competes with DB I/O. Routing should detect this (compare OLLAMA_HOST vs IGOR_HOME_DB_URL host) and prefer remote (OR cluster or cloud) when both are hammering same box. Lives in inference_gateway.py or cloud_mode.py as a new gate condition. Akien: this should be a node in the inference selector decision tree.
body.title: Inference selector: deprioritize local when DB is on same box
body.result: db_colocated field added to InferenceContext. Detected from IGOR_HOME_DB_URL (localhost/127.0.0.1 = colocated). _local_preferred() returns False when colocated — avoids RAM contention between Ollama and Postgres.
